channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 13th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please repair x1 chipped kerb stone with concrete fillet 280x100x40mm (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 13th May
item.description:
Tree problem
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 13th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please replace x1 broken rocking dropped kerb stone 900x100x30mm stats required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbour's car parked blocking easy access to my property., 13th May
item.description:
Neighbour at 45 Oak drive Brockworth parks car in front of their door, despite having 2 allocated parking spaces, thereby blocking easy access to my bungalow 22 Elm Drive Brockworth GL3 4DH.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Drive, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 13th May
item.description:
Second lot of rubbish dumped in this well known fly tipping hotspot so far this week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Pates Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: String of pot holes causing house to vibrate when vehicles drive over it, 13th May
item.description:
Outside 74 Evesham Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Evesham Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous branches overhanging property and pathway, 12th May
item.description:
The large tree at the kerbside between 145&147 Arle Road has multiple issues which are a risk to properly and persons if not addressed sooner rather than later. A couple of very large branches overhang 145 and 147 almost half way across the front parking area and if they fall damage would be caused to expensive vehicles. The branch affecting 147 has grown through the tree in the front garden and is damaging it and I would like it cut back from my boundary ASAP. Also there are low hanging branches on the path way at head height to a child and an accident is going to happen if not cut back well above head height to an adult. This is a route to and from school for many people and there is a danger of falling dead branches from the tree also. I have already moved one from the pathway onto the grass verge as it was blocking it. The view is severely restricted when looking for oncoming traffic due to this issue also. Can someone please make this tree and others with the same issues along Arle Road a priority rather than waiting the 28 days between departments reacting to each others findings.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arle Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded furniture, 12th May
item.description:
I only noticed this evening

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass blocking views, 12th May
item.description:
The grass in both directions (north and south) is blocking the junction view at this accident black spot.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clean Glass after Crash, 12th May
item.description:
Please can someone clean up the glass following the crash on 9th May at the end of Ashmead Drive.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashmead Drive, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path has not been re established for a number of years, 12th May
item.description:
Coffin trail footpath has not been reestablished in the field for a number of years - walkers go around the field edge which is not the official historical route
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coffin Path, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electric fence blocking access to the stile, 12th May
item.description:
Electric fence in field which you have to crawl under to get access to the silicon the other side of the field to exit

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Most of the path overgrown with weeds - increasingly inaccessible, 12th May
item.description:
Off Gambles lane - right hand side as entering from Woodmancote. Opening between 2 buildings just past Byfield Close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gambles Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass too long on all verges all round Highgrove Estate. It looks very uncared for and untidy. Weeds are extremely tall and whole area looks terrible, 12th May
item.description:
Grass verges overgrown all round Highgrove Estate (Trafalgar Drive) including between Essex Close, Tallis Close, Purcell Road, round to Glendower Close. Started last year but much worse this year the verges have not been cut at all.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Highgrove Way, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 50cm pothole in the middle of the road, 12th May
item.description:
Large pothole in the middle of the road between property number 18 Douro Road and junction of Christchurch Road. There are also several smaller potholes along the length of Douro road from the junction of Well street to Christchurch Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Drakes Place, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Degraded tarmac around metal covers, 12th May
item.description:
As you come off the roundabout onto Cheltenham Road, there are several smaller potholes along utilities/manhole covers. All the tarmac around the edges of them has degraded causing deeps and uneven road surface. A hazard for motorcyclists
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge hole in pavement, obstructing driveways, 12th May
item.description:
National Grid did emergency repairs but have left a massive hole in the pavement with piles of rubble

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, Arle Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Foul smell, 12th May
item.description:
Outside our house. 20 Nightjar Road. The smell carries on down the road to the drain at the bottom of the road (near the bin). This was an issue last year too. The smell is disgusting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightjar Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crumbling pothole repair on Shackleton Close, near the street lamp, 12th May
item.description:
There were recently pothole repairs on Shackleton close - most are fine, but the on carried out near the lamp post, near the driveway for Number 3, has crumbled and failed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Shackleton Close, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight has been out for a week or so., 12th May
item.description:
Column number 24 - Outside number 1 The Avenue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Moorend Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
